# Page or section

Which README, wiki page, release note, or in app text needs attention?

# What is wrong or confusing?

Describe the problem.

# Suggested wording

If you have wording in mind, add it here.

# Screenshots

Add screenshots if they help.

# File safety

Do not attach ROMs, NSPs, game dumps, private saves, tokens, personal data, or copyrighted assets.
